response.global_analysis: Audio phonetically matches the provided JSON for 'Fortune Spinner' and the later verse of 'Otonoke'. The JSON only provided a snippet for 'Otonoke', so I transcribed the full performance based on the audio and known lyrics. Timing is strictly synchronized to the vocal audio waveform, including the dialogue at the end. English translations for 'Fortune Spinner' and the dialogue (both originally in English) are preserved for the 'en' field as per instructions.

subtitles.original: ハイレタ ハイレタ ハイレタ
subtitles.english: I got in, I got in, I got in

subtitles.original: 此処と其処に何だか
subtitles.english: Somehow between here and there

subtitles.original: 4時44分回ったら
subtitles.english: Once it passes 4:44

subtitles.original: 凡借四水四分様が 構わんちゃばんがら
subtitles.english: Lord Bonshaku Shisui Shibun don't mind the noise

subtitles.original: 家部壊したんなら
subtitles.english: If you broke the gate

subtitles.original: 文字通りお疲れ様や
subtitles.english: Literally, thanks for your hard work

subtitles.original: ハイレタ ハイレタ...
subtitles.english: I got in, I got in...

subtitles.original: 眠り飽きた先で君を待ってた
subtitles.english: I was waiting for you at the end of my long slumber

subtitles.original: 楯手と矛歩が重なり合ったら
subtitles.english: When our shield hands and spear feet overlap

subtitles.original: 瞳が重なったら
subtitles.english: When our eyes meet

subtitles.original: 心体頭 満ちていく何かが
subtitles.english: Heart, body, head... something starts to overflow

subtitles.original: 背中に今 羽が生えたならば
subtitles.english: If wings were to sprout on my back right now

subtitles.original: 暗闇からさらば えい
subtitles.english: Farewell to the darkness, hey

subtitles.original: 飛び出していく彼方 えい
subtitles.english: Flying out to the far beyond, hey

subtitles.original: 心体頭 懐かしい温かさ
subtitles.english: Heart, body, head... a nostalgic warmth

subtitles.original: 足元に今 花が咲いたならば
subtitles.english: If flowers were to bloom at my feet right now

subtitles.original: 暗闇からさらば えい
subtitles.english: Farewell to the darkness, hey

subtitles.original: 飛び出していく彼方 えい
subtitles.english: Flying out to the far beyond, hey

subtitles.original: 何度だって生きる お前や君の中
subtitles.english: I'll live again and again, inside you and you

subtitles.original: 瞼の裏 闇耳の中
subtitles.english: Behind your eyelids, in the dark, inside your ears

subtitles.english: A melody that has settled deep in your chest

subtitles.original: リズムに
subtitles.english: To the rhythm

subtitles.original: 嬌声変わらど真ん中

subtitles.english: If you want to purify, bring a stack of bills for generations
